MARTIN GUAJARDO W/PET. RESP IN PRO PER NOW, SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY FILED 8/16/02 PER COMPUTER. RESP REPRESENTS THAT THE STIP FOR PRO TEM WAS SIGNED PREVIOUSLY. PET REQUESTS TIME TO FIND A FAMILY LAW SPECIALIST TO ASSIST HER. RESP SWORN AND EXAMINED RE: HIS REQUEST FOR BIFURCATION AND TERMINATION OF MARITAL STATUS. THE COURT GRANTS RESP REQUEST, MARITAL STATUS TERMINATED TODAY. RESP DOES NOT HAVE HIS JUDGMENT FORMS WITH HIM. CONDITIONS IN SECTION OF THE FAMILY CODE 2337 SHALL PROTECT THE PET UNTIL A FAMILY LAW SPECIALIST IS WORKING ON THE CASE. THE COURT SHALL ASSIST IN PREPARATION OF THE ORDER.
